title: Growth achievement album backend
summary: 35a 계약을 기반으로 user_achievement_awards, achievement album projection, tutorial category, grade label/image fields, silent backfill backend를 구현한다.
goal: 서버가 업적 앨범과 튜토리얼 카테고리 상태를 단일 authority로 계산하고, 35c MYPAGE UI가 소비할 gamification response를 제공한다.

owners.claude: stage1/stage3 normally, unavailable unless explicitly resumed
owners.codex: stage1 fallback, stage2 implementation, self-review per user instruction

required_checks: pnpm vitest run tests/user-achievement-album-policy.test.ts tests/user-achievement-awards.test.ts tests/user-achievement-backfill.test.ts tests/user-gamification-definitions.test.ts tests/user-gamification-notification-priority.test.ts tests/user-progress-level-v2.test.ts tests/user-growth-activity-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-api-client.test.ts tests/mypage-growth-profile.test.tsx tests/mypage-gamification-card.test.tsx tests/mypage-screen.test.tsx tests/growth-toast-stack.test.tsx tests/gamification-archive-surface.test.tsx
verify_commands: pnpm vitest run tests/user-achievement-album-policy.test.ts tests/user-achievement-awards.test.ts tests/user-achievement-backfill.test.ts tests/user-gamification-definitions.test.ts tests/user-gamification-notification-priority.test.ts tests/user-progress-level-v2.test.ts tests/user-growth-activity-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-api-client.test.ts tests/mypage-growth-profile.test.tsx tests/mypage-gamification-card.test.tsx tests/mypage-screen.test.tsx tests/growth-toast-stack.test.tsx tests/gamification-archive-surface.test.tsx

notes: 35b backend implementation is ready for PR review on feature/be-35b-growth-achievement-album-backend. It implements user_achievement_awards, achievement_album projection, tutorial-only active steps as the quest bridge, Clay-to-Titanium grade image fields, achievement_unlocked notification priority, recipe_registered non-XP activity projection, and silent read-time reconciliation/backfill without toast fan-out. Local verification passed: targeted Vitest set, pnpm verify:backend, validate:source-of-truth-sync, validate:workflow-v2, validate:workpack -- --slice 35b-growth-achievement-album-backend, git diff --check. CI=1 pnpm verify:backend:pr is not a package script, so pnpm verify:backend is the backend gate used for this branch.
